headline: Restaurant Owner Returns $12,000 Found in Antique Cabinet
meta_description: A South Carolina restaurateur discovered $12,000 in an old cabinet and tracked down the former owner to return the money.
summary_short: When a restaurant owner found a stack of cash in a cabinet he'd inherited with the business, he made it his mission to reunite it with its rightful owner.
body:
Sak Yiengjuntuek had just become the proud owner of a new restaurant when he made an unexpected discovery inside an old cabinet: a substantial sum of cash, neatly stacked in $100 bills. Rather than keeping the windfall, he immediately knew the right thing to do.

Yiengjuntuek tracked down the former owner and arranged to return the $12,000 in full. The two connected live on local news to share the reunion, turning what could have been a quiet transaction into a moment of genuine human connection. The story serves as a reminder that honesty and integrity still matter, and that doing the right thing—even when no one would know—remains a powerful choice.
